query:
INSERT INTO events (tournament_id, startgg_id, name, game_id, game_name, num_entrants, start_at)
           VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
           ON CONFLICT (startgg_id) DO UPDATE SET
               name         = EXCLUDED.name,
               num_entrants = EXCLUDED.num_entrants,
               start_at     = EXCLUDED.start_at
           RETURNING id
